title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 231.060 - Overseer to make annual report and settlement
text:
231.060.  Overseer to make annual report and settlement. — It shall be the duty of every road overseer to make a detailed report, under oath, to the county commission at each regular term thereof, and he shall, in February of each year, make to the commission his final report and settlement, under oath, of all moneys received and expended by him, from what source received and on what account expended.
(RSMo 1939 § 8521, A.L. 1945 p. 1478) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7875; 1919 § 10666; 1909 § 10469
